name: 84-Month Reforestation Amortization

eligibility.description: Applies to the 'amortizable basis' of qualified timber property which was not already deducted under the Section 194(b) expensing election.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Reforestation expenditures exceeding the $10,000 expensing limit can be amortized and deducted over a period of 84 months.
